overview.description: The Franklin U.S. Treasury Bond ETF (FLGV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed to invest in US Treasurys with remaining maturities of 1  30 years. FLGV was launched on Jun 9, 2020 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
